comments.author: @ankitnaik2038

comments.text: Well the No Claim Bonus (NCB) is typically lower for newer policies to encourage safe driving and loyalty over time. As you accumulate claim-free years, your NCB tends to increase, resulting in higher discounts on your premium. It's a reward system for maintaining a good driving record.
